meta.name: Image Optimizer
meta.description: Analyze legacy media and batch-compress to WebP variants; optionally rewrite URLs in articles and pages.

skipGif.title: Skip GIF
skipGif.description: GIF to WebP loses animation; skipped by default.

rewriteContent.title: Rewrite content URLs after optimize
rewriteContent.description: Replace old image URLs in articles and pages when the job completes.

cleanupOriginals.title: Delete originals after optimize
cleanupOriginals.description: Enable only after verification; old URLs will stop working.

dashboard.title: Asset analysis
dashboard.jobEmpty: No images to optimize (already optimized or source files missing).
dashboard.inactiveHint: Activate this plugin from the plugin list before running analysis or optimization.
